subcodes.first_line: The Day hath indeed come wherein He Who gave utterance to this wise Remembrance was raised up, and wherein the Call was lifted in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم الذی فیه بعث من نطق بهذا الذکر الحکیم و فیه ارتفع الندآء فی ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement
